subject: use https for healthchecks and vfw script
commit_message:

Patch Set 1:

Marco, Brian, fyi - robot healthcheck is changed to use https instead of http - robot works ok from my testing.

Patch Set 1:

consul ui, works well too, all tests passed on screen, fyi.
